conservative.name: Surprise Attack
conservative.requirements: Engaged with target, not visibly armed or target does not suspect you of being an enemy

success.description: You produce a dagger or similar weapon as if by magic and hit the target for normal damage
As above, and you may use Agility rather than Strength to determine damage if you choose

boon.description: Reduce the target's armour soak value by 2 for this attack

bane.description: You leave yourself open for a counterattack! If your target's next action is to attack you, he adds to his dice pool!
